title: Add debug logging to admin authorization in deleteMediaAsset

requirements.text: Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the current caller principal when the function is called

quotes: Log current caller principal when deleteMediaAsset is called.

acceptanceCriteria: Caller principal is logged at the start of deleteMediaAsset function execution
Log output clearly identifies it as the caller principal

requirements.text: Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the retrieved user data from storage after looking up the caller

quotes: Log retrieved user data from storage.

acceptanceCriteria: User data retrieved from storage is logged after the lookup operation
Log output shows the complete user record or null if not found

requirements.text: Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the detected role value from the user data
acceptanceCriteria: Role value is logged after it is extracted from user data
Log output clearly identifies it as the detected role

requirements.text: Modify the error message returned by deleteMediaAsset in backend/main.mo to include the detected role value when authorization fails

quotes: Return error message including detected role value.

acceptanceCriteria: Authorization error message includes the detected role value
Error message format clearly shows what role was detected for the caller

constraints: Do not change the authorization logic or any business logic in deleteMediaAsset
Only add debug logging statements and enhance error message output
Preserve existing function signature and return types
nonGoals: Fixing or modifying the authorization logic itself
Changing how roles are assigned or stored
Modifying the deleteMediaAsset function behavior beyond debug output
Adding new authorization features or requirements
